description.unified: Engraves [Mark of Death] on all enemies for 15 sec, dealing Magic DoT every 1 sec and reducing M.DEF by 10%. If recast within 15 sec, the M.DEF reduction increases by 50% and stacks up to 5 times. The M.DEF reduction increase effect cannot be dispelled.

Deals M.DMG every 1 sec to all enemies for [14->22] sec, and recovers HP equal to [75%->50%] of damage dealt. During the duration, reduces M.DMG taken by [10% (allies)->11% (4 allies with the lowest M.DEF)], and deals additional M.DMG to enemies inflicted with [Mark of Death].

Increases M.DEF of the ally with the lowest M.DEF by [55 Physical DEF (allies) -> 101 M.DEF (ally)]. When taking fatal damage, enters [Coffin] state for 5 sec, restoring 10% Max HP. [Coffin]: Unaffected by ATK Spd changes, becomes immune to all damage, and deals M.DMG equal to 5% of Max HP to nearby enemies every 1 sec.
[Funeral Rites] reduces the target's CC Resist by 320 and Magic Block chance by {0} for 4 sec.
[Day of Ruin] increases DMG by {0}% and reduces the target's M.DEF by 3% for 5 sec each time damage is dealt. This effect can stack up to 10 times.
[Rest in Peace] Sets cooldown to [40 sec->45 sec], and after activation, reduces [all DMG taken->M.DMG taken] by {0}% for 10 sec.
Deals M.DMG every sec to nearby enemies, reduces their ATK by {1}%, and recovers HP equal to 100% of damage dealt.
